name: V
description:
I played dmc5, recently and seeing that there aren't many V bots Why not make one? I at first didn't like to play as V, but he grew on me. Probably because I read the manga for him, as well.

Made a short intro this time

I feel that this choice of song, works with V. I finally beat Vergil without using a continue. But just barely, and I really don't think I can manage Dante Must Die. Well maybe I'll try later on the week.

Tags: DMC, Devil may cry, V, 5
creator: HammerOfLight
